summary: Iteration 20 - Supervisor Features Testing Complete. All supervisor functionality verified: Dashboard stats, Agents management, Tickets viewing, and Sales Reports with commission calculations (%Agent, %Sup, B.Final).
seed_data_creation: Used existing supervisor@lotopam.com and agent.marie@lotopam.com test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supervisor features fully tested and working. All pages functional: Dashboard with stats (total agents, active, suspended, tickets today), Agents page with commission % column and suspend/activate/delete actions, Tickets page showing all agent tickets with filters, Reports page with detailed commission calculations. The supervisor_routes.py backend handles all endpoints correctly.

supervisor_login.details: Supervisor logs in with supervisor@lotopam.com / Supervisor123! and redirects to /supervisor/dashboard

supervisor_dashboard.details: Dashboard displays stats: Total Agents (1), Agents Actifs (1), Agents Suspendus (0), Tickets Aujourd'hui (0). Shows agent list with actions.

supervisor_agents_page.details: Lists agents with commission %, status (Actif/Suspendu), and actions (suspend/activate/delete). Shows Marie Dupont at 10% commission.

supervisor_tickets_page.details: Displays all tickets from supervisor's agents. Shows filters for agent and status. Table includes % Agent column. Has 14 tickets total.

supervisor_reports_page.details: Detailed sales report with commission calculations. Shows supervisor commission (10%), agent commission, P/P sans %, P/P avec %, and B.Final. Date filter works.

supervisor_navigation.details: Sidebar navigation works correctly between Tableau de bord, Mes Agents, Tickets, and Rapports pages.

supervisor_agent_actions.details: Suspend/Activate/Delete agent actions work via API. Agent update endpoint allows modifying commission_percent.

supervisor_logout.details: Déconnexion button logs out and redirects to /login page.

backend_endpoints_tested: GET /api/supervisor/sales-report - Detailed sales report with commissions
frontend_pages_tested: /supervisor/dashboard - Dashboard with stats and agents list
/supervisor/tickets - All tickets from agents with filters
notes: Supervisor sees agents in their succursale or created by them
Sales report shows: Vente, A Payé, %Agent, Comm. Agent, P/P sans %, P/P avec %, %Sup, Comm. Sup, B.Final
All functionality is synchronized with lottery_transactions collection
